profile.title: Profile
profile.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
profile.terms_content: These are the terms and conditions for using Zouz...
profile.privacy_content: This is the privacy policy for using Zouz...
profile.biometric_desc: Login with Face ID or Touch ID
profile.two_factor_desc: Add an extra layer of security
profile.delete_account_desc: Permanently delete your account and data
profile.delete_confirm_desc:
Are you sure you want to delete your account? Under Saudi PDPL regulations:

• Any remaining active packages or wallet balances will be permanently lost and cannot be refunded.
• Your personal data will be completely anonymized.
• Order history is retained anonymously for VAT and audit compliance.
• You will NOT be eligible for welcome offers or promotions if you register again.
profile.email_verify_desc: We sent a 6-digit verification code to your email. Enter it below to confirm changes.
profile.email_verify_error: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
profile.email_change_note: Note: Changing your email will require verification.
